raw_question: 对比2025年第三季度销售费用率低于行业均值和高于行业均值公司的平均净利润率，用柱状图展示差异
raw_question_json: [{"Q":"对比2025年第三季度销售费用率低于行业均值和高于行业均值公司的平均净利润率，用柱状图展示差异"}]

query_plan.question: 对比2025年第三季度销售费用率低于行业均值和高于行业均值公司的平均净利润率，用柱状图展示差异

sql:
WITH industry_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(operating_expense_selling_expenses / NULLIF(total_operating_revenue, 0)) AS avg_selling_expense_ratio
    FROM financials_view
    WHERE report_period = '2025Q3'
),
company_ratios AS (
    SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr,
           operating_expense_selling_expenses / NULLIF(total_operating_revenue, 0) AS selling_expense_ratio,
           net_profit_margin
    FROM financials_view
    WHERE report_period = '2025Q3'
      AND total_operating_revenue IS NOT NULL
      AND total_operating_revenue != 0
      AND operating_expense_selling_expenses IS NOT NULL
      AND net_profit_margin IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT CASE WHEN cr.selling_expense_ratio < ia.avg_selling_expense_ratio THEN '低于行业均值' ELSE '高于行业均值' END AS category,
       AVG(cr.net_profit_margin) AS avg_net_profit_margin
FROM company_ratios cr
CROSS JOIN industry_avg ia
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY category;

meta.source_sql:
WITH industry_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(operating_expense_selling_expenses / NULLIF(total_operating_revenue, 0)) AS avg_selling_expense_ratio
    FROM financials_view
    WHERE report_period = '2025Q3'
),
company_ratios AS (
    SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr,
           operating_expense_selling_expenses / NULLIF(total_operating_revenue, 0) AS selling_expense_ratio,
           net_profit_margin
    FROM financials_view
    WHERE report_period = '2025Q3'
      AND total_operating_revenue IS NOT NULL
      AND total_operating_revenue != 0
      AND operating_expense_selling_expenses IS NOT NULL
      AND net_profit_margin IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT CASE WHEN cr.selling_expense_ratio < ia.avg_selling_expense_ratio THEN '低于行业均值' ELSE '高于行业均值' END AS category,
       AVG(cr.net_profit_margin) AS avg_net_profit_margin
FROM company_ratios cr
CROSS JOIN industry_avg ia
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY category;

turn_answers.Q: 对比2025年第三季度销售费用率低于行业均值和高于行业均值公司的平均净利润率，用柱状图展示差异

A.content: 在2025年第三季度，销售费用率低于行业均值的公司，其平均净利润率为5.81%；而销售费用率高于行业均值的公司，平均净利润率更高，为8.34%。

answer_json: [{"Q": "对比2025年第三季度销售费用率低于行业均值和高于行业均值公司的平均净利润率，用柱状图展示差异", "A": {"content": "在2025年第三季度，销售费用率低于行业均值的公司，其平均净利润率为5.81%；而销售费用率高于行业均值的公司，平均净利润率更高，为8.34%。", "image": ["./result/B1064_1.jpg"]}}]
notes: 查询计划要求对比2025Q3销售费用率低于和高于行业均值的公司的平均净利润率。由于metrics中指定了“净利润”和“销售费用”，但“销售费用”在schema中对应operating_expense_selling_expenses，且需要计算销售费用率（销售费用/营业收入）。首先计算整个行业在2025Q3的平均销售费用率，然后为每家公司计算其销售费用率和净利润率（net_profit_margin）。接着根据每家公司的销售费用率是否低于行业均值进行分类，最后计算每个类别的平均净利润率。结果分为“低于行业均值”和“高于行业均值”两类，适合柱状图展示。
